signatureAbility.signatureDescription: The most tenacious defenders beat their blocks by sheer force of will. When they enter the zone, their rush move attempts are free.
Defenders with this ability have a chance to receive dominant bull rush wins when their stamina is full. This consumes additional stamina.
Defenders with this ability do not need to spend a point on shed attempts during a run play
Defenders with this ability use faster; more dominant pass rush moves while rushing from the interior of the defensive line.
Players with this ability are harder to knock out of The Zone
Players with this ability have a chance to replenish their stamina, once per play, when it is half depleted
Players with this ability will distract defenders for longer with their runoffs
Ballcarriers with this ability will frequently attempt to gain extra yards while being tackled
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Defenders with this ability use faster run shed moves for a better chance at shedding blocks within 5 yards of the goal line.
